title: APC InRow Cooling SNMP Fan Speed and Airflow Trending
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:cooling"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=cooling sourcetype="snmp:apc:cooling" earliest=-24h
| eval fan_pct=tonumber(coalesce(airIRFanSpeed, fan_speed_pct, ""))
| eval airflow=tonumber(coalesce(airIRFanAirflow, airflow_cfm, ""))
| timechart span=1h avg(fan_pct) avg(airflow) by unit_name
description: Creeping fan demand with flat IT load warns of filter fouling or under-filled racks breaking airflow paths.
value: Schedules proactive filter changeouts and commissioning checks.
implementation: (1) Baseline per season. (2) Alert when fan_pct rises 20 points at same load.
grandmaExplanation: We watch fan workload so clogged filters do not sneak up on us.
